text:
There once lived a man named Harry Potter.


Harry Potter loved books. Books fascinated him.


Harry Potter found witches online. Pretty witches.


One night, Harry Potter got kicked out.


That night was awful.


Harry dreamt about snakes.



He woke up sweating.




Harry Potter bought books.




That night was better.


Harry Potter read.



Harry Potter found joy.



Books became friends.





End Of Story.



Did that happen?


I think books talk.








Just imagine.



What books?

That sounds nice.




What books?

A very old edition.

That could talk?


I think they did.

That sounds exciting.








I'd listen.



That sounds fun.




Would I?


Every day.



That sounds great.




I get lost.


You know.





Would I?

Just once.




That's my favorite place.




A book.


Harry Potter flew.



A wizard.




End.




That book.



I could hardly breathe.


Was that nice?

Nothing likes flying.


Such books.














Such books.

Just think.







It's quiet
